name: PhD Candidate
history: PhD candidate engaged in scientific research. References to a sequencing-related study and a colleague named Kelly. Working on a project with a senior scientist who has struggled to gain recognition in his career.
intermediate_belief: I must work harder to be recognized.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not good enough compared to others.
coping_strategies: Overworking to compensate for feelings of inadequacy.
situation: Comparing themselves to colleagues who work longer hours and publish more papers.
auto_thought: I will never be as successful as my colleagues.
behavior: Working excessively long hours and feeling anxious about productivity.
